name: Caribbean Pirates
short_description: A tactical board game about the battles of sailboats in the Caribbean Sea. Spaniards, Englishmen, pirates, privateers, corsairs and the ringing of piastres and doubloons.
detailed_description:
Caribbean Pirates is a board game that immerses players in the world of sailing battles in the Caribbean at the end of the 17th century. Different game tasks in several missions, you can play for different sides against each other, together on the same screen or against the computer.
Become a pirate, board the booty, or help the Spaniards take out galleons with gold!
There are 12 sailboats of various characteristics available in the game, from small luggers and sloops to large multi-gun galleons and battleships.
The game is easy to manage, try and become a thunderstorm of the archipelago!
